member.name: T:Enemies.Zombie
member.summary: Represents a Zombie enemy with health, a name, and a custom string representation.

member.name: P:Enemies.Zombie.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the zombie.

member.name: M:Enemies.Zombie.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with health set to 0.

member.name: M:Enemies.Zombie.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with specified health.
member.param: The initial health value. Must be greater than or equal to 0.

member.name: M:Enemies.Zombie.GetHealth
member.summary: Gets the current health of the zombie.

member.name: M:Enemies.Zombie.ToString
member.summary: Returns a string that represents the current zombie's name and health.
member.returns: A formatted string: "Zombie Name: {name} / Total Health: {health}"
